gt_sql: SELECT T2.translation FROM sets AS T1 INNER JOIN set_translations AS T2 ON T2.setCode = T1.code WHERE T1.name = 'Eighth Edition' AND T2.language = 'Chinese Simplified'
pred_sql:
SELECT st.translation
FROM sets s
JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
WHERE s.name = 'Eighth Edition'
AND st.language = 'Chinese Simplified';
question: What is the Simplified Chinese translation of the name of the set "Eighth Edition"?
